Container.Name: bricoprohq-api
Container.Overview: Bricopro HQ — FastAPI backend. Requires bricoprohq-db and bricoprohq-redis to be running first.

Config.Name: API Port
Config.Description: FastAPI backend port. Also used internally by the web container.

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: PostgreSQL connection string. Update password to match bricoprohq-db.

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: Random secret for JWT signing. Generate: python3 -c "import secrets; print(secrets.token_hex(32))"

Config.Name: Admin Email
Config.Description: Login email for the admin account (created on first start).

Config.Name: Admin Password
Config.Description: Login password for the admin account. Change this.
